properties.result: Sidebar populated with grouped board tiles (Imports / BA / SA / Other)
properties.name: List Boards
properties.trigger: App startup or boards.cleared WS event received by the UI

properties.result: UI shows placeholder tiles for boards that exist in the graph but not yet on disk
properties.name: Discover Renderable Boards
properties.trigger: App startup or analyst opens project with active Neo4j graph

properties.result: Excalidraw canvas loaded with board scene; sync status bar updated
properties.name: Open Board
properties.trigger: Analyst clicks a board tile in the sidebar

properties.result: Sync status resolved to one of: never-synced / dirty / synced; status bar indicator updated
properties.name: Get Board Sync Status
properties.trigger: Board opened or board.changed WS event received

properties.result: Board file written to disk; content hash updated in meta; WS board.changed broadcast; snapshot captured automatically
properties.name: Edit and Save Board
properties.trigger: Analyst makes changes in the Excalidraw canvas; auto-save fires or analyst presses save

properties.result: Skill run enqueued; runId returned; board overwritten by renderer; WS run progress events streamed
properties.name: Regenerate Board from Graph
properties.trigger: Analyst clicks Regenerate for a single board

properties.result: Markdown file written to disk; path and byte count returned
properties.name: Render Markdown from Graph
properties.trigger: Analyst triggers a markdown render for a given subtype (entity, uc, form, domain-model, uc-index, traceability)

properties.result: All registered projects returned with activeProjectId, config source, and optional unregistered-cwd banner
properties.name: List Projects
properties.trigger: Analyst opens project picker or projects.changed WS event received

properties.result: Active project record plus full resolvedConfig returned; UI banner shown for unregistered-cwd projects
properties.name: Get Active Project
properties.trigger: App startup or after project switch; UI needs resolved config

properties.result: Registry updated; configManager reloaded; Neo4j driver reset; WS active.changed + boards.cleared broadcast; sidebar refreshes
properties.name: Switch Active Project
properties.trigger: Analyst selects a different project in the project picker
